select_when: Existing categories, market assumptions, or inherited rules are distorting the problem rather than clarifying it.
The team needs to separate facts from conventions before deciding what is actually non-negotiable.
A novel solution requires rebuilding the argument from elemental truths instead of optimizing a stale template.
The current recommendation sounds polished, but no one has exposed the premises that make it true.
avoid_when: First principles is being used as a status move to ignore practical constraints, accumulated know-how, or real implementation costs.
The analysis is boiling the ocean or stopping at abstraction instead of producing a concrete, actionable recommendation.

curation_notes.summary: Focused the model on stripping assumptions, exposing premises, and rebuilding from elemental truths rather than on broad philosophy-of-truth prose.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor-style innovation heroics because the raw source is more useful as a disciplined assumption-breaking and problem-disaggregation model.
Did not add higher-order fields because this batch keeps Wave 4 observational only.
open_questions: The output type is reviewed compression over a source that spans invention, communication, and rigorous problem decomposition.

select_when.note: The raw strengths section is explicit on stale categories, fact-vs-convention separation, and novel solution rebuilds; review mainly compacts that surface into routing form.

avoid_when.note: The first condition is explicit in the danger line and the second combines the explicit boiling-the-ocean and stopping-at-abstraction warnings.

input_type.note: The raw model activates when assumptions distort the problem, but the compact input label is reviewed operational normalization.

output_type.note: The raw playbook rebuilds the argument from facts and desired outcomes; the output label compresses that into a typed reframing artifact.

reasoning_types.note: First principles thinking clearly uses deductive and metacognitive reasoning, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
